phaseGoal: 让 Threadsmith 在继续执行前识别 stale / missing context artifacts、暂停或失败运行，以及 accepted 后缺少 continuation 的状态，并推荐 sync、hygiene、repair、handoff 或继续。
deliverable: Runtime context recovery signal wired into supervisor state, health, gates, and next-best-step
inScope: detect missing current context packet when artifacts are loaded
detect stale current context packet when phase or acceptance changed
detect missing or stale role-specific packets
prioritize paused/running/failed runs before context freshness
wire recovery signal into supervisor state, health, gates, and next best step
read context artifacts through the local control-deck bridge
stopCondition: Supervisor state can expose a context recovery signal and next-best-step can recommend context sync or hygiene when current packet / role packet artifacts are stale or missing.
verificationForThisPhase: npm run test --workspace @threadsmith/runtime -- src/contextRecovery.test.ts src/nextBestStep.test.ts src/health.test.ts src/gates.test.ts src/supervisorState.test.ts
